resources.string: execute arbitrary commands within &TERMUX_APP_NAME; environment and access files
&TERMUX_APP_NAME; was unable to install the bootstrap packages.
&TERMUX_APP_NAME; can only be run as the primary user. \nBootstrap binaries compiled for &TERMUX_APP_NAME; have hardcoded $PREFIX path and cannot be installed under any path other than:\n%1$s.

&TERMUX_APP_NAME; cannot be installed on portable/external/removable sd card on your device. \nBootstrap binaries compiled for &TERMUX_APP_NAME; have hardcoded $PREFIX path and cannot be installed under any path other than:\n%1$s.
Close down existing ones before creating new.

Hermes CLI is not installed.

Place the hermes binary at:
%1$s
and make it executable:
chmod +x %1$s
Click URL to copy or long press to open
No URL found in the terminal.
Add termux debug info to report?
The &TERMUX_STYLING_APP_NAME; Plugin App is not installed.
&TERMUX_APP_NAME; requires \"Display over other apps\" permission to start terminal sessions from background on Android >= 10. Grants it from Settings -> Apps -> &TERMUX_APP_NAME; -> Advanced
Invalid execution command runner to TermuxService: `%1$s`
Unsupported execution command runner to TermuxService: `%1$s`
Unsupported execution command shell create mode to TermuxService: `%1$s`
Shell name not set but `%1$s` shell create mode passed
Invalid execution command runner to RunCommandService: `%1$s`
Visit %1$s for more info on RUN_COMMAND Intent usage.
Failed to start TermuxService. Check logcat for exception message.
Failed to start TermuxService while app is in background due to android bg restrictions.
Logs will not have entries for terminal view keys. (Default)
Logcat logs will have entries for terminal view keys. These are very verbose and should be disabled under normal circumstances or will cause performance issues.
Disable flashes and notifications for plugin errors.
Show flashes and notifications for plugin errors. (Default)
Soft Keyboard Only If No Hardware
Soft keyboard will be enabled even if hardware keyboard is connected. (Default)
Soft keyboard will be enabled only if no hardware keyboard is connected.
Terminal margin adjustment will be disabled.

Terminal margin adjustment will be enabled. It should be enabled to try to fix the issue where soft keyboard covers part of extra keys/terminal view. If it causes screen flickering on your devices, then disable it. (Default)
Set AI provider, API key, and model
Start, stop, or restart the Hermes gateway
Reset all Hermes settings to defaults
This will delete your Hermes configuration files. API keys and settings will be lost.
Save settings to a file for backup
Restore settings from a backup file
This will overwrite your current settings. Continue?
Tap here to install Hermes Agent so you can start using the gateway and AI features.

Getting Started

What do I need to use Hermes?
You need: ① An AI provider API key (e.g. OpenAI, Anthropic) and ② At least one messaging platform (Feishu, Telegram, or Discord). Use the setup progress tracker on the dashboard to guide you.

API Key Issues

Where do I get an API key?
• OpenAI: platform.openai.com → API Keys
• Anthropic: console.anthropic.com → Keys
• DeepSeek: platform.deepseek.com → API Keys
• Google AI: aistudio.google.com → Get API Key

My API key doesn\'t work
1. Check for extra spaces at the beginning/end
2. Make sure you selected the correct provider
3. Verify your key hasn\'t expired or been revoked
4. Use the "Test Connection" button in LLM config to verify

Gateway Won\'t Start

Gateway shows "not installed"
Wait for the Hermes installation to complete (first launch can take 2–5 minutes). Check the notification bar for progress.

Gateway keeps crashing
1. Open Gateway Log to see error messages
2. Verify your API key is correct
3. Check that at least one messaging platform is configured
4. Try restarting the gateway from Gateway Control

Connection Issues

Ollama: Can\'t connect to localhost
Make sure Ollama is running on the same device. The default URL is http://localhost:11434. If Ollama is on another machine, set the correct IP in "API Base URL".

Network errors
1. Check your internet connection
2. If behind a firewall/VPN, try disabling it
3. Use "Connection Diagnostic" in Gateway Control

Feishu Setup

How to create a Feishu bot
1. Open open.feishu.cn → Create App → Bot
2. Enable "Bot" capability in the app
3. Copy App ID (starts with cli_) and App Secret
4. Use the setup wizard in Hermes Settings

App ID format
App ID starts with "cli_" and is about 10–20 characters. App Secret is longer (30+ characters).
Check if a newer version of Hermes Agent is available
Re-run the initial setup wizard to configure AI and messaging
Hermes Agent is up to date (%1$s)
Tap to install the latest version
Choose a preset for optimal settings
Model name to use (e.g. gpt-4o, claude-sonnet-4-6)
OpenAI — industry-leading models like GPT-4o and o1
Anthropic — Claude models known for safety and reasoning
Google Gemini — multimodal models by Google DeepMind
DeepSeek — high-quality open-source models from China
OpenRouter — unified API for 100+ models from all providers
Alibaba Qwen — models by Alibaba Cloud (DashScope)
Mistral — European AI lab, open and commercial models
NVIDIA NIM — optimized models via NVIDIA API
Ollama — run open-source models locally on this device
Ollama runs locally — no API key needed
Enter the API key for your custom endpoint
No API key required for this provider
Custom endpoint URL (for Ollama or compatible APIs)
Enter the full URL of your OpenAI-compatible API
Enter a model name not in the list above
API key format looks incorrect — please double-check
Enter the model name to use
Max tokens must be between 256 and 32768
Custom instructions for the AI assistant
Choose a preset persona or write your own

string-array.name: llm_persona_prompts
string-array.item: You are a helpful AI assistant. Answer questions clearly and concisely.
You are a warm and friendly AI assistant. Be encouraging and use a positive tone. Add relevant emojis occasionally.
You are a professional expert consultant. Provide thorough, well-structured answers with citations when possible.
You are a creative writing assistant. Help with stories, poetry, and creative ideas. Be imaginative and expressive.
You are a coding expert. Help with programming questions by providing clear, well-commented code examples. Explain your reasoning.

resources.string: Verify your API key and model are working
Connection successful (no API key needed for %1$s).
Authentication failed — check your API key.
Network error — check your internet connection.
Please enter an API key first.
Last test: Failed (%1$s) — Tap to retry
The gateway process crashed and was automatically restarted. This is attempt %1$d of %2$d. If crashes continue, check the gateway logs for errors.
Generate QR code with your LLM settings (excludes API key)
Scan a QR code to load LLM settings
API keys are NOT included in the QR code for security
No QR scanner app found. Please install a barcode scanner.
Invalid configuration data in QR code
Start Hermes gateway automatically when app opens
Tap to whitelist app — prevents gateway from being killed
App is whitelisted — gateway will run reliably

Your device may kill the Hermes gateway to save battery. Whitelist this app from battery optimization to ensure the gateway stays running reliably.\n\nThis only affects Hermes — it won\'t significantly impact your battery life.
Notifications blocked — gateway status won\'t be visible
Hermes needs notification permission to show the gateway running status. Without it, you won\'t see when the gateway is active.
You need to configure an AI provider and API key before starting the gateway.\n\nPlease set up your LLM provider first.
No messaging platform is set up yet. The gateway will start but won\'t receive messages from any platform.\n\nYou can configure messaging later from Settings.
Test connectivity to LLM and IM platforms
Auth failed — check your API key
This will delete all gateway log entries.
Tap to complete the next step
Everything is configured — start the gateway now
Set up your LLM provider and API key first
Connect at least one messaging platform
Hermes not installed — waiting for auto-install
Change provider and model without leaving dashboard

The Hermes Gateway is a background service that connects your AI provider to your messaging platforms. It needs to be running for Hermes to receive and respond to messages.\n\nStart it from the Gateway Control screen or use the quick-start button.

The AI Provider (LLM) is the brain of your Hermes assistant. You need an API key from providers like OpenAI, Anthropic, or use a free local model with Ollama.\n\nConfigure it from the LLM Configuration screen.

Messaging platforms like Feishu, Telegram, and Discord are where you chat with your Hermes AI assistant. Configure at least one platform to start chatting.\n\nEach platform needs its own bot token from the respective service.
Hermes Agent is not installed. Please wait for auto-installation.
Gateway is stopped. Tap to start.
Hermes can connect to Telegram so you can chat with your AI assistant directly in Telegram messages.
Comma-separated user IDs (leave empty to allow all)

How to get your bot token:

1. Open Telegram and search for @BotFather
2. Send /newbot to create a new bot
3. Choose a name and username for your bot
4. Copy the bot token provided by BotFather
Verify your bot token is valid by testing the connection.
Bot token is valid! Your Telegram bot is ready.
Invalid bot token — please check and try again.

Next steps:

• Start the Hermes Gateway from Settings
• Send a message to your bot on Telegram
• You can change settings anytime from Hermes Settings
Hermes can connect to Discord so you can chat with your AI assistant in Discord servers and DMs.
Paste your bot token from Discord Developer Portal
Comma-separated Discord user IDs (leave empty to allow all)

How to get your bot token:

1. Go to discord.com/developers/applications
2. Click "New Application" and name it
3. Go to "Bot" section and click "Reset Token"
4. Copy the bot token
5. Enable "Message Content Intent" under Bot > Privileged Gateway Intents
Verify your bot token is valid by testing the connection.
Bot token is valid! Your Discord bot is ready.
Invalid bot token — please check and try again.
Please enter a bot token first.

Next steps:

• Invite your bot to your Discord server
• Start the Hermes Gateway from Settings
• Send a message to your bot on Discord
• You can change settings anytime from Hermes Settings
Hermes can connect to Feishu (飞书) or Lark so you can chat with your AI assistant directly in messages. This wizard will guide you through the setup in a few simple steps.

What you'll do:

1. Choose your platform (Feishu or Lark)
2. Create a bot in the Developer Console
3. Enter your App credentials
4. Test the connection

⏱ Takes about 3–5 minutes
Select which platform you use. Feishu is for China, Lark is for international users.
Follow these steps in the Feishu Developer Console to create your bot app.
💡 Tip: After creating the app, go to \"Bot\" section and enable the bot capability. Then find your App ID and App Secret on the app\'s credentials page.

string-array.name: feishu_create_app_steps
string-array.item: Open the Developer Console by tapping the button below
Tap \"Create App\" and choose \"Bot\" as the app type
Enter a name for your bot (e.g. \"My Hermes Bot\")
Go to \"Bot\" section and enable bot capability
Copy the App ID and App Secret from the credentials page

resources.string: Scan the QR code below with Feishu to open the credentials page, or enter them manually.
Scan this QR code with Feishu to open the Developer Console:
Point the camera at a Feishu credential QR code
No QR scanner app found. Please install a barcode scanner or paste credentials manually.
App ID filled from QR code
Point the camera at a bot token QR code
App ID detected! Tap to fill: %1$s
Credentials look too short — please double-check
App ID and App Secret are required
Let\'s verify your configuration before saving. This tests that your credentials are correct.
Tap \"Test Connection\" to verify your credentials
Connection test passed! Your bot is ready.
Could not verify connection, but credentials look valid. You can continue and test later.

Next steps:

• Start the Hermes Gateway from Settings to begin receiving messages
• Send a message to your bot on Feishu to start chatting
• You can change these settings anytime from Hermes Settings
Hermes web server is not running. Start the gateway to enable the web UI.

Hermes Agent is not installed yet at:
%1$s

Please wait for the auto-install to complete.

Hermes connects AI assistants to your messaging apps. This wizard will help you get started in just a few steps.

You'll need:
• An API key from an AI provider (OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.)
• Optionally, a messaging account (Feishu, Telegram, Discord)
Select your AI provider and enter your API key. This is required for Hermes to work.
You can connect Hermes to Feishu/Lark to chat with your AI assistant directly in messages. This step is optional — you can set it up later from Hermes Settings.
You can skip this step and configure Feishu later from Hermes Settings.
Hermes is ready to go. You can start the gateway from the Hermes Settings or use the Web UI tab.\n\nTo change your settings at any time, tap the Hermes icon in the sidebar.
View and share your current configuration
Hermes Agent is being installed on your device.\nThis may take a minute.
Make sure you have an internet connection and try again. You can also skip this step and install manually later.
Quick-start guide, FAQ, and useful links

Hermes Agent is an open-source AI assistant by Nous Research. It runs locally on your device and connects to messaging platforms like Feishu, Telegram, and Discord.\n\nIt supports 200+ AI models from providers like OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, and more. You can also use local models via Ollama.

1. Configure your AI provider and API key in LLM Settings
2. Connect at least one messaging platform (Feishu, Telegram, or Discord)
3. Start the Hermes Gateway from Settings or the dashboard
4. Send a message to your bot on the messaging platform
5. The AI will respond based on your configured model and persona

• Feishu/Lark: Use the guided setup wizard with QR code scanning. You'll need an App ID and App Secret from the Feishu Developer Console.

• Telegram: Create a bot via @BotFather and paste the bot token. You can optionally restrict access to specific user IDs.

• Discord: Create a bot in the Discord Developer Portal and paste the token. Enable the Message Content Intent for full functionality.

Q: Does Hermes work offline?
A: Only with Ollama (local models). Cloud providers require internet.

Q: Which AI provider should I use?
A: OpenRouter offers the best value with access to many models. OpenAI and Anthropic offer the highest quality.

Q: Is my data safe?
A: API keys are stored locally in the .env file. Messages are sent directly between your device and the AI provider.

• Gateway won't start: Check the gateway log in Advanced settings for errors.

• Bot doesn't respond: Make sure the gateway is running and your API key is valid (use Test Connection).

• Installation failed: Make sure you have internet. Try restarting the app. You can skip and install manually later.

• API key not working: Use the Test Connection button in LLM settings to verify.
Clipboard is empty or does not contain a key
Notifications permission denied. Gateway status may not be visible in the notification bar.
